required_skills: Shader development using node-based shader graphs (Unity Shader Graph, Unreal Material Editor) and hand-written HLSL
Art pipeline development and optimization bridging 3D content creation tools (Maya, Blender, Houdini) and game engines
Scripting and tool development in Python or MEL for Maya pipeline automation and asset processing
Deep understanding of Physically Based Rendering (PBR) material creation workflows and texture authoring best practices
Rigging and skinning systems including skeleton setup, blend shape creation, and LOD compliance for real-time characters
Performance budgeting for art assets including polycount limits, texture memory, draw call optimization, and LOD generation
Visual effects creation using engine particle systems (Niagara, Unity VFX Graph) for real-time environmental and combat effects
Proficiency in texture authoring and PBR texturing pipelines using Substance Painter and Substance Designer
preferred_skills: Procedural asset generation and environment tooling using Houdini and Houdini Engine plugin for in-engine procedural workflows
Vertex shader animation techniques including wind simulation, cloth movement, and crowd rendering using GPU instancing
Advanced real-time VFX development for hero effects including destruction, fire, fluid, and large-scale environmental events
Blueprint scripting (Unreal Engine) or C# scripting (Unity) for engine-side tool development accessible to non-engineers
Motion capture data processing and cleanup workflows integrating with engine animation pipelines
Performance analysis and GPU debugging for art-related bottlenecks using RenderDoc and engine profilers
Machine learning and AI art tool integration (NVIDIA Omniverse, Stable Diffusion pipelines) for accelerated content creation
responsibilities: Develop production shaders and materials using Unreal Material Editor, Unity Shader Graph, and hand-written HLSL that meet visual and performance targets simultaneously
Build and maintain art pipeline tools using Python and MEL scripting to automate asset export, validation, LOD generation, and batch processing workflows
Define and enforce technical art standards covering polygon budgets, texture memory limits, material complexity, and draw call targets for all asset categories
Create real-time visual effects using Niagara or Unity VFX Graph for environmental, combat, and UI effects that integrate seamlessly with the lighting and rendering pipeline
Collaborate with character artists and animators to build production rigs, skin meshes, and set up blend shape pipelines that deliver animator-friendly controls within engine constraints
Audit and optimize art assets flagged by profiling sessions, resolving overdraw, texture streaming issues, excessive bone counts, and shader complexity hotspots
Develop procedural content generation tools in Houdini Engine that allow environment artists to populate large-scale levels with controlled variation and minimal manual effort
Partner with rendering and graphics engineers to prototype new visual features, providing art-side implementation feedback and shader integration support
Onboard and train artists in technical workflows, delivering documentation, tutorials, and tooling that reduce dependency on engineering support for day-to-day art tasks
Evaluate and integrate emerging tools and technologies (NVIDIA Omniverse, AI-assisted texturing) into the production pipeline to improve team velocity and content quality
